## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs (`README` / `docs/`) if the public API changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Verified on iOS / Android / web as applicable
